skills.name: writing-skills
skills.author: obra
skills.description: Applies Test-Driven Development methodology to creating Claude Skills documentation. Provides concrete guidelines for writing effective SKILL.md files with emphasis on trigger-based descriptions, proper structure, and avoiding common pitfalls that cause Claude to skip reading full skill content.
skills.descriptionZh: 将测试驱动开发方法应用于Claude技能文档创建。提供编写有效SKILL.md文件的具体指南，强调基于触发的描述、正确结构，并避免导致Claude跳过阅读完整技能内容的常见陷阱。

skills.name: executing-plans
skills.author: obra
skills.description: A structured workflow skill for executing implementation plans with batch processing and review checkpoints. Provides clear guidance for systematic development with built-in quality controls.
skills.descriptionZh: 用于执行实施计划的结构化工作流技能，支持分批处理和审查检查点。为系统化开发提供清晰指导，内置质量控制机制。

skills.name: test-driven-development
skills.author: obra
skills.description: Use when implementing any feature or bugfix, before writing implementation code
skills.descriptionZh: 一个高度固执己见但有效的TDD技能，通过清晰的示例和严格的规则强制执行测试优先原则。非常适合需要结构化方法的开发者。

skills.name: writing-plans
skills.author: obra
skills.description: Creates detailed implementation plans for multi-step coding tasks with exact file paths, test code, and commands. Enforces TDD workflow with 2-5 minute steps and provides execution options via subagents or parallel sessions. Saves plans to structured markdown files.
skills.descriptionZh: 为多步骤编码任务创建详细的实施计划，包含精确文件路径、测试代码和命令。强制TDD工作流程，每个步骤2-5分钟，提供通过子代理或并行会话的执行选项。将计划保存到结构化的Markdown文件中。

skills.name: using-superpowers
skills.author: obra
skills.description: Use when starting any conversation - establishes how to find and use skills, requiring Skill tool invocation before ANY response including clarifying questions
skills.descriptionZh: 强制要求在Claude任何回复（包括澄清问题）之前必须调用相关技能。使用严格的决策流程图，列出常见规避借口以防止绕过规则。优先处理流程技能而非实现技能。

skills.name: brainstorming
skills.author: obra
skills.description: A structured conversational assistant that guides developers from initial ideas to concrete software designs. It asks focused questions, proposes multiple approaches, and documents validated plans before implementation begins.
skills.descriptionZh: 一个结构化对话助手，引导开发者从初步想法到具体软件设计。通过提问、提供方案选项并验证设计，最终生成实施前文档。

skills.name: dispatching-parallel-agents
skills.author: obra
skills.description: Use when facing 2+ independent tasks that can be worked on without shared state or sequential dependencies
skills.descriptionZh: 该技能提供了一种模式，用于分派多个AI代理并行处理独立的调试任务。适用于多个不相关的测试失败或子系统问题，可以在没有共享状态依赖的情况下并行调查。

skills.name: finishing-a-development-branch
skills.author: obra
skills.description: Use when implementation is complete, all tests pass, and you need to decide how to integrate the work - guides completion of development work by presenting structured options for merge, PR, or cleanup
skills.descriptionZh: 该技能指导开发者完成功能分支的收尾工作：先验证测试通过，然后提供四个明确选项（本地合并、创建PR、保留分支、丢弃），执行所选流程并清理工作树。

skills.name: receiving-code-review
skills.author: obra
skills.description: Use when receiving code review feedback, before implementing suggestions, especially if feedback seems unclear or technically questionable - requires technical rigor and verification, not performative agreement or blind implementation
skills.descriptionZh: 该技能为处理代码审查反馈提供了一个结构化流程，强调技术验证而非形式化同意。它定义了清晰的响应模式、禁止行为，以及对不明确或可疑反馈的具体处理方法。该方法优先理解需求、对照代码库现实进行检查，并系统地实施修复。

skills.name: using-git-worktrees
skills.author: obra
skills.description: Use when starting feature work that needs isolation from current workspace or before executing implementation plans - creates isolated git worktrees with smart directory selection and safety verification
skills.descriptionZh: 自动创建隔离的Git工作树，包含智能目录选择、.gitignore安全验证和自动项目设置。遵循严格的目录优先级规则，确保工作树内容不会污染代码库。

skills.name: subagent-driven-development
